import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get search analytics"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/admin/search/analytics"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Compute search usage analytics for a time period

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"description":"Time period (24h, 7d, 30d)","in":"query","name":"period","schema":{"type":"string","default":"24h"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"properties":{"average_duration_ms":{"description":"AverageDuration is the average search duration in milliseconds","type":"number"},"average_results":{"description":"AverageResults is the average number of results per search","type":"number"},"period":{"allOf":[{"properties":{"end":{"type":"string"},"start":{"type":"string"}},"type":"object"}],"description":"Period is the time range for these analytics"},"searches_by_mode":{"additionalProperties":{"format":"int64","type":"integer"},"description":"SearchesByMode shows the breakdown by search mode","type":"object"},"top_queries":{"description":"TopQueries are the most common search queries","items":{"properties":{"count":{"type":"integer"},"query":{"type":"string"}},"type":"object"},"type":"array"},"total_searches":{"description":"TotalSearches is the total number of searches in the period","type":"integer"},"unique_users":{"description":"UniqueUsers is the number of unique users who searched","type":"integer"}},"type":"object"}}}},"401":{"description":"Unauthorized","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"403":{"description":"Forbidden - admin only","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
